title: Mid lane now has a clearer scaling reward after quest completion
body: Patch 26.9 replaces mid's empowered recall reward with a 6% bonus AD and AP reward. Mid coaching should care more about clean quest completion into item spikes and less about the old recall tempo reward.
actionables: Review whether the mid laner completes quest without throwing away lane stability for low-value roams.
After quest completion, judge fights around item-spike timing because bonus AD/AP makes purchases more valuable.
Do not reuse old mid advice that assumes empowered recall is the reward pattern.

source.title: League of Legends Patch 26.9 Notes
source.notes: Derived from the Role Quest reward changes for mid lane in Patch 26.9.
